description_long: This is a pair of low-top, casual sneakers with an olive green upper and black accents. The shoes feature a combination of synthetic leather and fabric panels, with visible white stitching outlining the design. The laces are dark gray, threaded through metal-reinforced eyelets, and the tongue displays a stylized white logo. The midsole is white with a black stripe, and the outsole appears to be made of durable rubber. There are small logo patches on the heel and side, and the interior is lined with black cushioning for comfort.
description: A pair of olive green low-top sneakers with black accents, white stitching, and dark gray laces, featuring logo patches and a white midsole.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, dark gray laces, and the prominent white logo on the tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the layered panel construction, white stitching, and side logo patch.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel logo patch, black collar lining, and the white-stitched heel counter.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the panel details, stitching, and side logo patch.
attribute_logo: white stylized logo on tongue, rectangular patch on heel and side
